name: 1042s-organizer
description: Adobe Acrobat JavaScript tool that splits and organizes a multi-recipient IRS Form 1042-S PDF by recipient (Box 13a), keeping each form with its instruction pages, sorting alphabetically, and letting you retrieve any recipient's form on demand.

scripts.test: node test/mock-run.js && node test/stress-run.js && node test/random-run.js
